{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = White Fox aura
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[White Fox aura]] can gather in the atmosphere and create a white haze.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
